problem_statement: Implement ordinal(n) in ts/ordinal.ts, returning the number followed by its English ordinal suffix as a string. Numbers ending in 1, 2 or 3 take st, nd or rd respectively (1st, 42nd, 63rd) and everything else takes th — except the teens rule: when the last two digits are 11, 12 or 13 the suffix is th (11th, 112th, 1013th). Zero yields "0th". Negative, fractional, NaN or infinite inputs must throw a RangeError. Verify with bun test tests/ts/ordinal.
